LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF GRAHAM ULVESTAD MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO DEFENSES 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13 AND 14. PLAINTIFF SHIFTS BURDEN BY CITING DEFENDANTS FACTUALLY DEVOID SPECIAL INTERROGATORY RESPONSES AND PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PRESENT COMPETENT CONTROVERTING EVIDENCE. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO SEVENTH DEFENSE, MITIGATION - TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO WHETHER PLAINTIFF PROPERLY MITIGATED THE DAMAGES IS DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220

Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requrest For Admissions; And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Statement Of Request
Off Calendar Sep-25-2009 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Aug-31-2009 Unknown
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GRAHAM ULVESTAD MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Appearances: R. Stephen M. LaRoe, Esq. of Gearinger Law Group (415) 440-3176 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Grant Summary Adjudication as to defenses 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13 and 14. Plaintiff shifts burden by citing defendants factually devoid special interrogatory responses and plaintiff does not present competent controverting evidence. Summary Adjudication as to seventh defense, mitigation - Triable Issue of Fact as to whether plaintiff properly mitigated the damages is denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/REQ)Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay, Court Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2009 Set For Trial On Nov-02-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-16-09 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 504

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2009 Off Calendar
